response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with strong alignment on the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, and Docker/Kubernetes — and his current role at re:cinq explicitly covers AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, which directly matches the AI agent development requirement. A deeply ingrained testing culture (TDD, custom test libraries, Refactoring Dojos) is a further positive signal. The primary gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Vitest from his stated experience, no mention of Kotlin or Python despite both appearing in the required proficiency list, and limited PostgreSQL exposure.
strengths: Production-grade TypeScript/Node.js/React experience across multiple companies, most recently Optilyz and re:cinq
Active AI agent and developer tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) in current role
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, created open-source D-language test libraries, organized Refactoring Dojos and Code Katas
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned despite both being primary stack requirements
Python and Kotlin absent from listed skills, yet both appear in the required proficiency section
Database exposure skews toward MongoDB and MySQL; no PostgreSQL reference in a role that lists it as a target database
